_comment: Step 4a (Plan) fixture for SimpleFPS. See ./README.md for what each key does and how to refresh.

scene_runtime._comment: domain_overrides is the load-bearing 4a knob — _merge_scene_runtime() preserves these across classifier reruns. Add entries as e2e fixtures expose misclassifications (e.g. Turret routing client when it should be server).

_aspirational_keys_documented_for_future._comment: These are documented in phase-4a-overview.md but the pipeline does not yet consume them. Listed here so we can populate them when the wiring lands.
